description_long: This is a large, modern house with a flat green roof and multiple levels, surrounded by manicured hedges and a perimeter wall. The property features a spacious driveway, a gated entrance, and a detached pool area with lounge seating. The house has expansive windows, several balconies, and outdoor terraces, providing ample natural light and outdoor living space. The landscaping includes rows of tall, slender trees along the property edge and geometric garden features. The exterior is predominantly white with glass and metal accents, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. The layout suggests multiple living zones, including open-plan communal areas and private quarters.
description: A large, modern multi-level house with flat green roofs, expansive windows, and a gated driveway, surrounded by manicured hedges and a detached pool area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gated driveway, main entrance, and a row of tall trees along the right side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open backyard, geometric garden features, and the main living areas with large windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the detached pool area, multiple balconies, and extensive outdoor terraces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the driveway, garage entrance, and the arrangement of windows and terraces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and multiple balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide, modern door with a flat overhang, accessed via a paved driveway and framed by minimalist landscaping.
